requestSummary: 在酒店列表页新增 88VIP 会员模块，标题为“88VIP订酒店更优惠”，展示万豪白金挑战、希尔顿一住升金、闪购早餐券等权益，点击后筛选符合条件的酒店。
globalAssumptions: 用户提供的 Figma 节点 246:3488 是本次新增模块所在的酒店列表页画板。
新增模块属于会员类型，使用列表页会员模块规范。

tasks.requestSummary: 在已有酒店列表页新增 88VIP 会员权益筛选模块。

pageRules: figma design agent 页面级设计规范.md#Page02·列表页
pageSpecConstraints: 模块整体圆角 24px；模块内卡片圆角 12px；标签圆角 4px。
会员模块底色使用 #FEF5EC 或 92deg 渐变 #FEF5EC 0% 到 #FDEDDB 100%。
模块内边距 24px；独立内容间距 24px；基础间距 18px 或 12px；同类型重复元素间距 6px。
模块标题 30px #0F131A；正文 28px #5C5F66；辅助文字 24px #919499。
模块级卡片不使用描边，不使用阴影。

proposalImage.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: bitmap proposal image for a Figma mobile hotel list page module. Primary request: regenerate the design direction for a new 88VIP member module on an existing Fliggy hotel list page, using image generation rather than SVG/vector drawing. The mockup should show a realistic 750px-wide mobile hotel list context with search bar, sorting/filter chips, a compact existing promo row, then the new 88VIP module before the first hotel card. Required exact Chinese text in the module: title “88VIP订酒店更优惠”; benefits with subtitles: “万豪白金挑战” + “连住达标挑战升级”, “希尔顿一住升金” + “入住1晚解锁金卡”, “闪购早餐券” + “限时券包早餐更省”; CTA text “去筛选”. Changes requested by user: remove the standalone 88VIP badge/mark from the module, use light skeuomorphic icons for the three benefits, use the product-standard Fliggy primary button color rather than a black button. Module purpose: tapping the module filters hotels that match these 88VIP benefit conditions. Visual direction: polished Fliggy-style Chinese travel app UI, warm light-gold member atmosphere, refined and premium but lightweight, compact enough for a hotel listing flow, not a full membership-center page. Design constraints from Page02 list page: module overall radius 24px, inner cards radius 12px, tag radius 4px, member background #FEF5EC to #FDEDDB warm gradient, 24px module padding, title about 30px dark #0F131A, body about 28px #5C5F66, auxiliary about 24px #919499, no heavy outline and no drop shadow. Button: rounded primary CTA filled with Fliggy brand yellow #FFE033, dark text #0F131A, right arrow affordance. Layout: a horizontal module around 714px wide inside a 750px mobile page, prominent title, one concise supporting line, three benefit cards in a row with light skeuomorphic travel/member icons and subtitles, and the yellow CTA on the right. Reference inspiration: borrow only warm-gold membership mood, light icon-card rhythm, card hierarchy, and restrained decoration from membership benefit pages; do not copy page structures, business copy, prices, brand elements, navigation, membership levels, or unrelated modules. Avoid: any separate 88VIP badge, black CTA button, SVG/vector/flat diagram look, wireframe look, unreadable tiny text, placeholder gibberish, excessive dark brown luxury palette, full-screen membership center, decorative clutter, UI cards overlapping text, text clipping, in-app explanation text about the design process.

visualAnchors: 模块作为列表页筛选入口，宽度跟随列表页内容区，视觉位置建议在快筛栏/营销条附近与首张酒店卡前。
暖金会员氛围，但保持列表页轻量密度，不能变成整屏会员中心。
标题突出“88VIP订酒店更优惠”，右侧使用筛选/箭头 CTA 明确可点击。
三项权益以紧凑横向权益卡或图标+短文案呈现：万豪白金挑战、希尔顿一住升金、闪购早餐券。
留白节奏遵循 24px 外框内边距、12px/18px 内容间距，模块高度自适应且不压迫酒店卡片流。
decorativeAssetCandidates: 已从确认方案图裁出三枚轻拟物装饰元素：皇冠、希尔顿房卡、早餐券，并处理为透明 PNG 后上传 Figma。

figmaWrite.summary: 已替换此前压缩版模块，重新按确认的 image gen 参考图还原：大比例暖金会员卡片、右侧 #FFE033 去筛选 CTA、三张大权益卡、从方案图裁出的皇冠/房卡/早餐券透明 PNG 装饰素材。模块位于列表页营销组件之后、首张酒店卡之前。

tasks.handoffNotes: 已按用户反馈修正：此前简化版没有按方案图视觉和装饰素材流程还原，现已重新走 prepare_assets/write_figma/self_check。模块截图保存为 /Users/tianzhongyi/Documents/figma-design-agent/runs/assets/20260515-1806-88vip-module-figma-reference-rework-v2.png，整页截图保存为 /Users/tianzhongyi/Documents/figma-design-agent/runs/assets/20260515-1806-list-after-88vip-reference-rework.png，对比图保存为 /Users/tianzhongyi/Documents/figma-design-agent/runs/assets/20260515-1806-88vip-reference-vs-figma-rework.png。

透明素材来自确认方案图局部裁片并做本地抠图，没有重新走二次绿底 image gen；当前红/绿/黑/模块底色校验均通过。
